_README: Auto-registered MCP servers for the work-dashboard plugin.
Granola + Gmail + Drive work out of the box (OAuth on first use).
Calendar and Slack need per-user credentials — run /dashboard-setup for guided setup,
or manually set GOOGLE_OAUTH_CREDENTIALS (calendar) + SLACK_BOT_TOKEN / SLACK_TEAM_ID (slack) in your environment.
Until credentials are set, those two MCPs will fail to start — the dashboard still renders, those sections just show 'source unavailable'.
